title: Expedia Group Our Story
note: Official corporate overview covering Expedia's history, brand expansion, Vrbo/HomeAway integration, platform consolidation, stay options, activities, and company purpose.

title: Travel with us | Expedia Group
note: Official product overview for Expedia Group consumer travel brands including Expedia, Hotels.com, and Vrbo.

title: Your Partner in B2B Travel Solutions
note: Official partner portal describing Expedia Group inventory distribution, B2B solutions, APIs, white-label travel, advertising, and inventory listing categories.

title: Expedia Travel
note: Consumer product page showing Expedia's stays, flights, cars, packages, things to do, cruises, deals, rewards, and property listing entry points.

title: Vrbo Vacation Rentals
note: Consumer and host product page describing whole-home vacation rentals, VrboCare support, host listing entry points, and more than 2 million bookable vacation rentals.

title: Expedia Group Stock Price and Statistics
note: Provides EXPE market statistics, profile, 2025 revenue and earnings, trailing profitability, PE ratio, share count, and employee count around the June 2026 refresh.

title: Expedia Group (EXPE) Market Capitalization
note: Point-in-time source for Expedia Group market capitalization and market-cap history.

title: QloApps Open Source Hotel Booking Management Software
note: Describes QloApps as a free and open-source hotel management and reservation system with PMS, booking engine, hotel website, channel manager, marketplace, and vacation-rental support.

title: Qloapps/QloApps GitHub Repository
note: Repository source for QloApps public codebase, project description, stars, forks, issues, and release activity.

title: QloApps Booking Engine
note: Details booking management, real-time availability, dynamic pricing, refunds, confirmation emails, search, mobile booking, PMS integration, and channel management features.

title: OpenTravel Developers Network
note: Technical source for OpenTravel publications, artifacts, implementer support, and travel-industry message specifications.

title: About Fairbnb.coop
note: Documents Fairbnb.coop's cooperative model, local nodes, host rules, community projects, local ambassadors, and community governance mechanics.

title: Is there a fee I am paying to Fairbnb.coop?
note: Documents Fairbnb.coop's host-fee position and guest-paid platform fee split between the platform and community projects.

title: Fairbnb.coop LinkedIn Company Profile
note: Company profile describing Fairbnb.coop as a cooperative accommodation booking platform funding local initiatives.

title: BTCPay Server Documentation
note: Documents BTCPay Server as free, open-source, self-hosted Bitcoin payment gateway software with invoices, refunds, peer-to-peer payments, and Lightning support.

title: NIP-15: Nostr Marketplace
note: Explains NIP-15 marketplace primitives for decentralized merchant stalls, product listings, encrypted orders, Bitcoin or Lightning payments, and application-level trust tradeoffs.
